response.step_by_step_log: The video shows Usada Pekora performing "SANADANCE 戦CISE" during her 6th anniversary live. Lyrics were found via web search for "SANADANCE 戦CISE". The song is primarily in Japanese with some English phrases. The artist is identified as Daito Music.
response.global_summary: A music performance video featuring Usada Pekora performing the song "SANADANCE 戦CISE" as part of her 6th anniversary 3D live concert. The video includes the performance and a brief outro by the character.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora performs "SANADANCE 戦CISE" with backup dancers on stage. Title/credits visible in the corners of the screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
回せ！ しゃがめ！ 伸ばせ！ 空に叫べ！SANADANCE 戦CISE! Wow Wow Wow… 
(It’s Cypher time) 
Close your eyes 瞑想 
Don’t think…Feel 
感覚研ぎ澄ませたなら高まる Passion Force 
Y.U.K.I.M.U.R.A. 
... 
苦しい時や辛い時には 体動かせよ SANADANCE 
天上天下 唯我独尊 みんなで踊ろうぜ SANADANCE 
Let’s Go! Take A Chance! Change the world! 
深呼吸 Ba Hoooooo!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Spin! Crouch! Stretch! Scream to the sky! SANADANCE SEN CISE! Wow Wow Wow… 
(It’s Cypher time) 
Close your eyes, meditate. 
Don’t think… feel. 
If you sharpen your senses, your Passion Force will rise. 
Y.U.K.I.M.U.R.A. 
... 
When times are hard and painful, move your body! SANADANCE. 
Heaven and Earth, unique in all the world, let's all dance! SANADANCE. 
Let’s Go! Take A Chance! Change the world! 
Deep breath, Ba Hoooooo!
